title: DGFT Recruitment 2026 - Apply for Young Professional Posts
description: Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT) has declared the official notification for the recruitment of Young Professional Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Post Graduation, can grab this chance and apply for the DGFT Recruitment 2026 . Here we mentioned more information about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
